title: Loose hold on campus bouldering wall
description: The large blue jug on the 45-degree overhang in the main rec center is spinning. It poses a safety hazard and needs to be tightened with an Allen wrench immediately.

evidence.comment: Close up of the spinning hold.

title: Network outage in Computer Lab 3
description: None of the desktop workstations in Lab 3 can connect to the internet. The main switch in the server closet shows a red error light.

title: Leaking HVAC unit in Library
description: Water is dripping from the ceiling vent in the quiet study zone on the second floor. We put a bucket under it, but it needs a permanent fix.

evidence.comment: Internal shot of the condensation line.
